tweets.text:
A quick update for everyone following this: 

I've been asking for help since March 9th about my ClawHub skill slugs being maliciously hijacked. To be clear, this isn't just name-squatting—someone is forking my open-source code and publishing it directly. 

Despite repeated promises that it will be resolved, there has been absolutely zero progress. 

I am now seriously considering no longer publishing my skills to ClawHub.

quoted.text:
Hi @steipete and @4shadowed, following up on my previous message, just wanted to check if there's been any update on the  skill slug ownership process?

To add more context: I published a new skill named baoyu-diagram on GitHub yesterday, and by today someone had already published it to  ClawHub under a different account. I literally went from "just pushed to GitHub" to "can't publish my own skill" in under 24 hours.

Same issue affects a few more other skills of mine. Would love any guidance on how to resolve this.

Thanks!

https://t.co/9KBQYIqyHj

https://t.co/7RoDl9J0Av

quoted.text:
Hi @steipete and @4shadowed, is there a formal process to appeal ClawHub skill ownership or request a transfer? I’m running into a case where someone forked my repo and published some of my skill slugs first, and now I can’t publish/update them under my own account. 

These skills are already used by many people on other platforms, so I’d strongly prefer not to rename them. Any guidance would be appreciated.

tweets.text: 鸭哥这条对 AI 分析的在理，很多 Codex 的黑话就是英文直译成中文带来的翻译腔👍

quoted.text:
AI 写的中文，读两行就能认出来。

"三条反馈都很关键，我都接住。"
"迁移到我们现在的问题，就得到一个更锋利的重构："
"你的直觉被数据验证了，比我预期的更干净："

语法没错，意思也通，就是别扭。换模型、换 prompt 都去不掉。

我最近注意到这股味儿的真实身份：翻译腔。上面每一句都能翻回英文——"I caught all of them"、"a sharper refactoring"、"verified cleaner than I expected"。字是中文，骨架是英文的。

鲁迅和王小波骂了一百年的老问题，现在被 AI 批量生产出来了。但套路有限，最常见的四种：

一是物理动作描述思考。"接住"来自 catch，"锋利"来自 sharp，"不崩"来自 doesn't break。英文里有棒球和物理生活的支撑，搬到中文里就悬空了。日常说"收到"、"记下"，不说"接住"。

二是形容词替读者先下判断。"逻辑很清晰：""问题很直接："——后面的事实自己能让读者感受到清晰，形容词是多余的。

三是抽象名词做主语、形容词收尾。"工程上的现实比这些数字难看"——读完不知道哪儿难看。

四是有中文译法的英文词直接混用。context、state、cache 都有稳定对译，留着英文只让读者反复切换。

本质是同一个问题：AI 写中文时先用英文句法想清楚，再逐字换成中文。怎么改？别修修补补，重写。用中文里本来会怎么说，重新说一遍。

https://t.co/kd02Ax1Cwg
